history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop K♦7♠2♣: BB checks.

explanation.zh: K72 彩虹面强烈偏向 BTN 的开局范围（范围优势 + 坚果优势）。顶对顶踢用小尺寸 c-bet（25%–50%）：BB 的口袋对、7x、后门听牌会继续付钱，而小注让你整个范围都能便宜施压、被加注时损失也小。
explanation.en: K72 rainbow heavily favors the BTN opening range (range and nut advantage). Top pair top kicker c-bets small (25–50%): BB's pocket pairs, 7x and backdoors keep paying, and the small size lets your whole range apply cheap pressure with little lost when raised.

check.zh: 过牌放掉两条街的价值。干燥面上 BB 很少有反击的牌，没有"设陷阱"的必要。
check.en: Checking gives up streets of value. On this dry board BB rarely has a hand to fight back with — there is nothing to trap.

bet100.zh: 全底池会把 BB 的弱牌全部赶走，留下的恰是能抗衡你的部分——价值变薄而不是变厚。
bet100.en: A pot-sized bet folds out everything worse and keeps exactly what competes with you — value gets thinner, not thicker.

objective.zh: 在范围优势牌面用小尺寸 c-bet 取价值。
objective.en: Use a small range-advantage c-bet for value.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop K♠Q♦8♣: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 66 在 KQ8 上是脆弱的摊牌价值：下注几乎不会被更差的牌跟注（被跟即落后），也很难把 Qx/Kx 诈走——两头不讨好。过牌控池、保留摊牌价值，转牌再根据行动与来牌决定。
explanation.en: 66 on KQ8 is fragile showdown value: a bet is rarely called by worse (called means behind) and will not fold out Qx/Kx — it accomplishes neither goal. Check back for pot control, keep your showdown value, and reassess on the turn.

bet33.zh: 小注也达不到目的：更差的牌大多弃牌，更好的牌一张不弃——既非 value 也非有效 bluff。
bet33.en: Even a small bet achieves nothing: worse hands mostly fold, better hands never do — neither value nor an effective bluff.

bet75.zh: 大注把 66 变成纯 bluff，可它明明还有摊牌价值——烧掉它得不偿失。
bet75.en: A big bet turns 66 into a pure bluff while it still has showdown value — burning that value is a losing trade.

objective.zh: 识别"下注两头不讨好"的中等牌，学会 check back 控池。
objective.en: Recognize hands where betting accomplishes neither goal, and check back for pot control.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop A♥6♥2♠: BB checks.

explanation.zh: A 高干燥面强烈偏向 BTN 范围，整个范围可以小注施压；9♥8♥ 是完美的半诈唬——对手弃牌你直接赢，被跟注还有 9 张同花补牌（到河约 36%）随时反超。
explanation.en: The ace-high dry board heavily favors the button's range, so the whole range can stab small; 9♥8♥ is the perfect semi-bluff — folds win now, and if called you still hold nine flush outs (~36% by the river) to take over.

check.zh: 放过范围压力，还送 BB 一张免费转牌来反超你的 9 高——半诈唬的两条赢牌路径全被关掉。
check.en: Checking surrenders the range pressure and gifts BB a free turn to outdraw your nine-high — both ways a semi-bluff wins get switched off.

bet100.zh: 把半诈唬打成高价纯诈唬：你有 36% 权益兜底，根本不需要为弃牌率支付全池的价格。
bet100.en: A pot-sized bet turns the semi-bluff into an overpriced pure bluff: with 36% equity as a floor, you never needed to pay full pot for folds.

objective.zh: 学会用听牌做半诈唬：弃牌赢 + 补牌赢的双路径。
objective.en: Semi-bluff with draws: win by folds now or by outs later.

history.en: Preflop: CO (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 K♦8♣4♥：BB 过牌，你下注 1.8bb，BB 跟注。
history.en: Flop K♦8♣4♥: BB checks, you bet 1.8bb, BB calls.
Turn Q♣: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 转牌 Q 把你升级成顶两对，同时给 BB 的 Qx、KJ、顺子听牌更多跟注理由——强成手在变湿的牌面要敢做大尺寸：75% 池取足价值，并为河牌的最后一枪铺路。
explanation.en: The turn queen upgrades you to top two pair while giving BB's Qx, KJ and straight draws more reasons to call — strong hands size up on wetter boards: 75% pot charges full value and sets up the river barrel.

check.zh: 顶两对过牌是双重浪费：错过一条街的价值，还让同花/顺子听牌免费抽牌。
check.en: Checking top two wastes a street of value and lets the flush and straight draws peel for free.

bet33.zh: 尺寸与牌力错配：能跟 33% 的牌大多也能跟 75%——小注只是在给自己的强牌打折。
bet33.en: Size mismatched to strength: most hands calling 33% also call 75% — the small bet just discounts your monster.

objective.zh: 强成手在转牌敢于做大价值尺寸。
objective.en: Size up for value on the turn with strong made hands.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop K♦Q♣8♠: both players check.
Turn 7♥: BB bets 3bb, you call.

history.zh: 河牌 2♦：BB 下注 10.5bb（约 3/4 池）。
history.en: River 2♦: BB bets 10.5bb (about 3/4 pot).

explanation.zh: 面对转牌-河牌的连续火力，A 高需要约 30% 胜率才能平衡这笔 3/4 池的跟注（10.5 ÷ 35），而 BB 这条线上价值组合远多于诈唬组合。纪律性弃牌不是认输，它本身就是 +EV 的决策。
explanation.en: Against turn-and-river barrels, ace-high needs about 30% equity to break even on this 3/4-pot call (10.5 ÷ 35), and BB's line is packed with far more value than bluffs. A disciplined fold is not surrender — it is the +EV decision itself.

call.zh: A 高在这条行动线上抓不到足够的诈唬：对手两条街开火的范围以成手为主，30% 的需求胜率达不到。
call.en: Ace-high cannot catch enough bluffs on this line: a two-street barreling range is value-heavy, and you fall short of the 30% you need.

raise100.zh: 把一手有明确弃牌权的牌变成昂贵诈唬：对手敢在河牌开 3/4 池的范围很少向加注弃牌。
raise100.en: Turning a clear fold into an expensive bluff: a range confident enough to bet 3/4 pot on the river rarely folds to a raise.

objective.zh: 河牌面对持续火力，守住弃牌纪律。
objective.en: Hold the fold-discipline line against river barrels.

history.en: Preflop: CO (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop A♠8♣3♥: BB checks.

explanation.zh: A83 彩虹是开局者范围的主场：你的 AQ、AK、大对子密集命中或压制。顶对好踢脚用 25%–50% 小注全范围施压，BB 的口袋对与后门听牌会继续付钱。
explanation.en: A83 rainbow is home turf for the opening range: your AQ, AK and big pairs land densely. Top pair good kicker bets small (25–50%) so BB's pocket pairs and backdoors keep paying.

check.zh: 过牌白送一条价值街；这张面 BB 几乎没有反击牌，无陷阱可设。
check.en: Checking donates a street of value; BB rarely has a hand to fight back with here.

bet100.zh: 全底池只留下能打你的牌——价值变薄不变厚。
bet100.en: Pot-size folds out everything worse and keeps what beats you — thinner value, not thicker.

objective.zh: 在范围主场用小注 c-bet 取价值。
objective.en: Small range c-bet for value on your home-turf board.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop K♠7♦2♣: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 中set 也穿全范围的外套：K72 干面整个范围都在小注，暗三条混在里面既收 Kx 与口袋对的钱，又不暴露牌力。大注反而把弱牌全吓走。
explanation.en: A flopped set wears the range coat: on dry K72 the whole range bets small, so your set milks Kx and pocket pairs while staying disguised. A big bet only scares the customers away.

check.zh: 干面慢打的代价是转牌可能杀死行动；让付费街从现在开始。
check.en: Slowplaying a dry board risks action-killing turns; start the paying streets now.

bet100.zh: 超大注与你的范围脱节，等于举牌告诉对手「这手不一样」。
bet100.en: An oversized bet splits from your range and announces this hand is different.

objective.zh: 强牌融入范围下注，不用尺寸暴露自己。
objective.en: Hide monsters inside the range bet — never tell with sizing.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop T♥8♥4♣: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 坚果同花听 + 两张超牌是顶级进攻燃料：现在拿下底池或被跟注后仍有约 45% 权益。湿面上用 50%–75% 的更大尺寸施压，让 BB 的对子付高价抽你。
explanation.en: Nut flush draw plus two overcards is premium fuel: take it now or hold ~45% equity when called. On a wet board size up to 50–75% and make BB's pairs pay to chase you.

check.zh: 白送免费牌还放弃弃牌权益——半诈唬的两条腿都被砍断。
check.en: A free card surrenders fold equity too — both legs of the semi-bluff cut off.

bet25.zh: 湿面小注几乎不施压，等于邀请所有听牌便宜跟进。
bet25.en: A tiny bet on a wet board applies no pressure and invites every draw in cheaply.

objective.zh: 组合听牌选大尺寸半诈唬。
objective.en: Size up semi-bluffs with combo draws.

history.en: Preflop: CO (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop 9♥5♠2♦: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 952 彩虹谁都没中，但「谁的高牌更大」仍由开局者说了算。KQ 两张超牌带后门，用 33% 跟着范围一起下注：弃牌率可观，被跟注也有六张直接改进牌。
explanation.en: Nobody hits 952 rainbow, but the bigger high cards still belong to the opener. KQ with backdoors joins the 33% range bet: plenty of folds now, six direct outs when called.

bet100.zh: 无人命中的面用大注是花高价买便宜东西。
bet100.en: Paying pot-size for a board nobody hit is overpaying for cheap real estate.

bet75.zh: 75% 同样超出这张面需要的压力——小注就能完成任务。
bet75.en: 75% is more pressure than this board needs — small already does the job.

objective.zh: 干燥低面跟随范围小注。
objective.en: Follow the range bet small on dry low boards.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop A♥K♦9♠: BB checks.

explanation.zh: AK9 双高张面虽利于你的范围，但 55 本身被两张高牌压顶、几乎不被更差的牌跟注。过牌控池保留摊牌价值；小注作为范围一员也成立——这正是混合点。
explanation.en: AK9 favors your range, but 55 itself sits under two overcards and gets called by almost nothing worse. Checking preserves showdown value; the small range bet is the legitimate other wing of the mix.

bet75.zh: 中注两头不靠：好牌不弃、差牌不跟，纯粹烧钱保护一手怕见行动的牌。
bet75.en: A medium bet serves neither goal: better hands stay, worse hands fold — burning money to protect a hand that hates action.

objective.zh: 弱摊牌价值优先控池。
objective.en: Protect weak showdown value with pot control.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop Q♥J♥8♥: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 三同花连面是 BB 防守范围的乐园：同花、两对、强听牌密度极高，你的 AK 连一张红心都没有。收缩战线过牌，转牌再看——湿面上克制就是利润。
explanation.en: A monotone connected board is paradise for the BB's defends: flushes, two pairs and big draws everywhere, and your AK holds zero hearts. Pull in the horns, check, reassess on the turn.

bet75.zh: 大注撞进对方范围最密的牌面，被加注时你只能扔掉权益。
bet75.en: Betting big into the densest part of his range gets you raised off your equity.

bet33.zh: 即便小注，这张面也几乎得不到比你差的跟注。
bet33.en: Even small, almost nothing worse continues on this texture.

objective.zh: 湿面识别范围归属后收缩。
objective.en: Read the texture, then pull back on hostile boards.

history.en: Preflop: CO (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop K♥8♦3♣: BB checks.

explanation.zh: K 压住了 QQ，但 K83 干面仍是你的范围主场：33% 小注从 8x、口袋对和顽固的高牌处收钱，同时把价格留得足够小——被 Kx 加注时损失可控。
explanation.en: The king caps QQ, yet dry K83 is still your range's turf: a 33% bet collects from 8x, pocket pairs and stubborn overcards while keeping the price small enough to escape Kx raises cheaply.

bet100.zh: 大注做了一张「不是 Kx 就别跟」的筛网——筛掉的恰是你的客户。
bet100.en: A big bet filters for Kx-or-fold — and filters out exactly your customers.

fold.zh: 没人下注就弃牌不存在；先用小注问话。
fold.en: There is no bet to fold to — ask the question with a small bet first.

objective.zh: 次强对子小注兼顾价值与控损。
objective.en: Bet strong-but-capped pairs small: value with an exit.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop 6♥5♣2♦: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 两头顺听 + 后门同花在低连面上进攻最舒服：这张面也部分属于 BB，所以带权益的牌而不是空气来下注。50% 让对子做出真实决定，命中 4 或 9 后还有大注空间。
explanation.en: Open-ended plus a backdoor flush is the natural attacker on a low connected board: since BB owns part of this texture, bet your equity hands, not air. 50% makes pairs sweat, with room to pile on when a 4 or 9 lands.

check.zh: 放弃弃牌权益，还让转牌的主动权易主。
check.en: Gives up fold equity and hands the turn initiative away.

bet100.zh: 超大注把 BB 的弃牌做成了你唯一的赢法——权益牌不需要孤注一掷。
bet100.en: Overbetting makes folds your only win — equity hands need not shove their chips at it.

objective.zh: 连面用权益牌承担进攻。
objective.en: Let equity hands carry the aggression on connected boards.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 3-Bet 到 11bb，BTN 跟注。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you 3-bet to 11bb from the BB, BTN calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 Q♠7♦2♥：轮到你先行动。
history.en: Flop Q♠7♦2♥: action is on you first.

explanation.zh: 3-Bet 底池里你的范围带着 QQ+、AK 的坚果优势来到 Q72：小注 33% 让整个范围继续讲同一个故事，AK 两超牌六张改进牌，且 22.5bb 的底池里每 1bb 压力都被放大。
explanation.en: In the 3-bet pot your range arrives at Q72 with QQ+/AK nut advantage: a 33% bet keeps the whole range telling one story, AK holds six clean outs, and in a 22.5bb pot every chip of pressure is amplified.

bet75.zh: 3-Bet 锅的小注换算成绝对值已经很大，75% 纯属浪费筹码效率。
bet75.en: Small is already big in a 3-bet pot; 75% wastes chip efficiency.

fold.zh: 没有任何下注摆在面前；先手权在你。
fold.en: Nobody has bet — the initiative is yours.

objective.zh: 3-Bet 锅延续范围优势小注。
objective.en: Press the 3-bet-pot range edge with a small bet.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 3-Bet 到 11bb，BTN 跟注。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you 3-bet to 11bb from the BB, BTN calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 K♦8♠4♣：轮到你先行动。
history.en: Flop K♦8♠4♣: action is on you first.

explanation.zh: K 高面同时撞进 BTN 跟 3-Bet 的 KQs、AK 区间，你的 AQ 落空且被支配风险高。过牌控制这口已经很深的锅，保留同花后门与 A/Q 的六张牌；小注作为范围延续也存在。
explanation.en: A king-high flop smacks the KQs/AK part of BTN's 3-bet-calling range while your AQ whiffs with domination risk. Check to control an already-deep pot, keeping the backdoor and six outs alive; the small range bet exists too.

bet75.zh: 深锅里用大注保护一手落空牌，是把小问题升级成大问题。
bet75.en: Big-betting a whiffed hand in a deep pot upgrades a small problem into a big one.

objective.zh: 3-Bet 锅落空时优先控池。
objective.en: When the 3-bet pot misses you, control it.

history.zh: 翻前：你在 BTN 加注 2.5bb，BB 3-Bet 到 11bb，你跟注。
history.en: Preflop: you open the BTN to 2.5bb, BB 3-bets to 11bb, you call.
Flop 9♠6♥3♦: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 对手 3-Bet 后过牌，963 低面下你的 TT 是绝对超对：小注向 AK、AQ 这类高牌收「抽牌税」，同时给自己留好被 check-raise 时的撤退价格。
explanation.en: Facing a check after his 3-bet, TT is the clear overpair on 963: a small bet taxes his AK/AQ floats while pricing in an affordable exit if a check-raise arrives.

bet100.zh: 把 AK 全吓走、把 QQ+ 全留下——大注精准筛掉客户。
bet100.en: Folds out every AK and keeps every QQ+ — a precision filter against your own customers.

fold.zh: 超对面对一手过牌没有弃牌这回事。
fold.en: Overpairs do not fold to a check.

objective.zh: 3-Bet 锅超对小注收税。
objective.en: Tax the floats: overpair, small bet, 3-bet pot.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 SB 3-Bet 到 11bb，BTN 跟注。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you 3-bet to 11bb from the SB, BTN calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 A♥7♣4♠：轮到你先行动。
history.en: Flop A♥7♣4♠: action is on you first.

explanation.zh: A 砸在 KK 头上不舒服，但 A74 整体仍属 3-Bet 方：你的范围里 AK 密度远高于对手。33% 小注让 88–QQ 立刻难受，被跟注后转牌再评估——KK 此刻退化为「带着两张大牌的范围注」。
explanation.en: The ace over KK stings, yet A74 still belongs to the 3-bettor: your range is dense with AK. A 33% bet squeezes 88–QQ immediately; reassess on the turn — for now KK is a range bet wearing two big cards.

bet100.zh: 两极化大注在你被 Ax 压制时正中下怀。
bet100.en: Polarizing big right where Ax dominates you plays into his hands.

fold.zh: 先手未受任何压力就放弃，把 3-Bet 的故事撕掉了。
fold.en: Surrendering with zero pressure tears up your own 3-bet story.

objective.zh: A 高面 3-Bet 方仍握范围权。
objective.en: The 3-bettor keeps range authority on ace-high boards.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.

history.zh: 翻牌 A♥8♠3♣：你过牌，BTN 下注 1.8bb（33%）。
history.en: Flop A♥8♠3♣: you check, BTN bets 1.8bb (33%).

explanation.zh: 顶对中踢脚是教科书跟注：足够强到不弃、不够强到加注膨胀。跟注让 BTN 的全范围小注继续犯错——他的空气会在转牌继续讲故事，你的 A9 就在那里等着。
explanation.en: Top pair, medium kicker is the textbook call: too strong to fold, not strong enough to bloat with a raise. Calling lets BTN's range bet keep making mistakes — his air will keep talking on the turn, and your A9 will be listening.

fold.zh: 对 33% 的小注弃掉顶对，是给全桌发「请随意诈唬我」的请柬。
fold.en: Folding top pair to a third-pot bet mails the whole table an invitation to bluff you.

raise100.zh: 加注只赶走比你差的、留住比你强的——典型的反向筛选。
raise100.en: Raising folds out worse and keeps better — selection exactly backwards.

objective.zh: 顶对中踢用跟注防守。
objective.en: Defend top pair, medium kicker, by calling.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.
Flop 7♠4♦2♣: you check, BTN bets 2.8bb (50%).

explanation.zh: 两头顺听 + 同花后门在自己的地盘（低连面利防守方）：跟注是基本盘——价格合适、伪装满分；check-raise 半诈唬是均衡里真实存在的另一翼，对常规对手跟注更稳。
explanation.en: Open-ended with a backdoor flush, on your own turf (low connected boards favor the defender): calling is the baseline — right price, full disguise; the check-raise semi-bluff is the genuine other wing, but versus standard opponents the call runs smoother.

fold.zh: 八张直接改进牌 + 完美底池赔率，这是整张面上最不该弃的牌之一。
fold.en: Eight clean outs at a perfect price — among the last hands this board wants you folding.

objective.zh: 强听牌在防守面至少跟注。
objective.en: Strong draws on defender boards never fold — call at minimum.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.

history.zh: 翻牌 K♣9♥5♠：你过牌，BTN 下注 4.1bb（75%）。
history.en: Flop K♣9♥5♠: you check, BTN bets 4.1bb (75%).

explanation.zh: 面对 75% 的大注，顶对好踢脚正是你防守区间的脊梁：弃掉它，BTN 的两极化下注就只剩收益没有风险。跟注，让他的诈唬翼在转牌继续花钱。
explanation.en: Against a 75% barrel, top pair good kicker is the spine of your defense: fold it and his polarized bet becomes all reward, no risk. Call, and make his bluff wing keep paying on the turn.

fold.zh: 把防守脊梁弃掉，MDF 直接崩盘——你会被任意两张牌打到弃光。
fold.en: Folding your spine collapses MDF — any two cards can now bet you off everything.

raise100.zh: 对两极范围加注：诈唬全跑、价值全跟，最坏的交换。
raise100.en: Raising a polar range folds the bluffs and keeps the value — the worst trade available.

objective.zh: 用顶对撑住对大注的最低防守。
objective.en: Hold the MDF line with top pair versus big bets.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.

history.zh: 翻牌 Q♥9♠4♣：你过牌，BTN 下注 1.8bb（33%）。
history.en: Flop Q♥9♠4♣: you check, BTN bets 1.8bb (33%).

explanation.zh: 中对 + 后门同花对 33% 小注是标准防守：四倍赔率只需约 20% 权益，而你对他全范围的胜率远高于此。转牌再决定去留——现在弃牌等于把权益白送。
explanation.en: Middle pair with a backdoor flush versus a third-pot bet is a standard defend: 4:1 needs only ~20% equity and you hold far more against his whole range. Decide on the turn — folding now donates your equity.

fold.zh: 对最小压力弃中对，是 BB 位置最常见的慢性漏洞。
fold.en: Folding middle pair to minimum pressure is the BB's most common slow leak.

raise100.zh: 中对加注后被跟注的牌几乎全部领先你——主动把自己变成弱势方。
raise100.en: Once your raise gets called, nearly everything that called has you beat — self-inflicted.

objective.zh: 中对对小注稳跟一条街。
objective.en: Call one street with middle pair versus small bets.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.

history.zh: 翻牌 A♥7♦3♠：你过牌，BTN 下注 1.8bb（33%）。
history.en: Flop A♥7♦3♠: you check, BTN bets 1.8bb (33%).

explanation.zh: QJ 高牌在 A 高干面上既无对子、无听牌、也无后门：跟注的唯一剧本是「祈祷转牌」。没有计划的跟注只是更贵的弃牌——把这 1.8bb 留给有故事的牌。
explanation.en: QJ high on an ace-high dry board has no pair, no draw, not even a backdoor: calling's only script is praying for turns. A call without a plan is a more expensive fold — save the 1.8bb for hands with a story.

call.zh: 浮牌需要后续武器（位置、权益或牌面优势），这里一样都没有。
call.en: Floating needs a follow-up weapon — position, equity or board leverage. You have none.

raise75.zh: 在最利于他范围的牌面上诈唬加注，是逆着风点火。
raise75.en: Bluff-raising his best board is lighting a match into the wind.

objective.zh: 无权益高牌守住弃牌纪律。
objective.en: Equityless high cards keep the fold discipline.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.

history.zh: 翻牌 K♠8♣4♠：你过牌，BTN 下注 2.8bb（50%）。
history.en: Flop K♠8♣4♠: you check, BTN bets 2.8bb (50%).

explanation.zh: 暗三条在带同花听的 K 高面上要现在建锅：check-raise 让 Kx 与同花听立刻付高价，转牌任何一张黑桃或连牌都可能杀死行动。慢打是把价值押给一张不一定友好的转牌。
explanation.en: Bottom set on a king-high board with a flush draw wants the pot built now: the check-raise charges Kx and draws immediately, since any spade or connector can kill the action. Slowplaying mortgages your value to an unfriendly turn.

fold.zh: 把暗三条弃掉不需要解释为什么错——需要解释的是手为什么会点下去。
fold.en: Folding a set needs no analysis of why it is wrong — only of how the finger slipped.

objective.zh: 湿面强牌用加注立即建锅。
objective.en: Raise monsters on wet boards — build now.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.
Flop 9♥6♥2♠: you check, BTN bets 2.8bb (50%).

explanation.zh: 坚果同花听 + 顶张 A 是 check-raise 半诈唬的招牌牌：他立刻弃掉的部分是纯利润，跟注后你仍握 40%+ 权益与后两街的火力。跟注同样成立，但加注把两条赢牌路都拉到最宽。
explanation.en: The nut flush draw with an ace overcard is the poster child for the check-raise semi-bluff: his instant folds are pure profit, and when called you still hold 40%+ equity plus two streets of leverage. Calling works too — raising just opens both winning roads widest.

fold.zh: 把全场最强的听牌弃掉，等于在自己的主场弃权。
fold.en: Folding the best draw on the board is forfeiting a home game.

objective.zh: 坚果听牌主动加注施压。
objective.en: Nut draws attack — check-raise and squeeze.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.

history.zh: 翻牌 A♥8♦4♣：你过牌，BTN 下注 1.8bb（33%）。
history.en: Flop A♥8♦4♣: you check, BTN bets 1.8bb (33%).

explanation.zh: 口袋 99 被 A 压顶，但对他的全范围小注仍有大量胜率（高牌、后门、更小对子）。跟一条街、对后续大注保持警惕；直接弃牌也在混合里——这正是「一条街原则」的练习题。
explanation.en: Pocket nines sit under the ace yet still beat plenty of his range bet (overcards, backdoors, smaller pairs). Call one street and stay alert to further barrels; folding now lives in the mix too — this is the one-street principle in drill form.

raise100.zh: 加注把自己活生生改造成一手诈唬——被跟住的瞬间 99 一文不值。
raise100.en: Raising converts 99 into a bluff in real time — the moment you are called it is worthless.

objective.zh: 被压顶口袋对执行一条街防守。
objective.en: Capped pocket pairs defend exactly one street.

history.zh: 翻前：CO 加注 2.5bb，你在 BTN 跟注，盲注弃牌。
history.en: Preflop: CO opens to 2.5bb, you call on the BTN, blinds fold.
Flop J♣6♦2♠: CO checks.

explanation.zh: 翻前加注者过牌，主动权掉在地上——捡起来。88 在 J62 上向 AQ、AK、KQ 这类放弃的高牌收保护费，小注还顺手测出他是真弃还是设伏。过牌求摊牌也成立，但白送两张免费翻牌。
explanation.en: The preflop raiser checks and the initiative hits the floor — pick it up. On J62, 88 taxes the AQ/AK/KQ hands he just gave up on, and the small bet doubles as a trap detector. Checking it down works, but gifts two free cards.

bet100.zh: 吓走全部高牌后，留下来的没有一手是你想见的。
bet100.en: After the big bet scares off every overcard, nothing that remains is anything you want to see.

objective.zh: 对手放弃主动权时小注接管。
objective.en: When initiative is dropped, pick it up with a small bet.

history.zh: 翻前：CO 加注 2.5bb，你在 BTN 跟注，盲注弃牌。
history.en: Preflop: CO opens to 2.5bb, you call on the BTN, blinds fold.
Flop A♦7♠5♣: CO bets 2.1bb (33%).

explanation.zh: A75 正是 CO 开局范围的甜区，你的 KQ 没对子、没听牌、连后门都没有，且 Ax 把你的六张「改进牌」一半变成反向陷阱。位置救不了零权益——弃牌。
explanation.en: A75 is the sweet spot of CO's opening range; your KQ has no pair, no draw, no backdoor, and his Ax turns half your six 'outs' into reverse traps. Position cannot rescue zero equity — fold.

call.zh: 没有权益的位置浮牌是用位置给亏损镀金。
call.en: Floating with no equity is gilding a loss with position.

raise100.zh: 在他范围最厚的面上加注，被跟注后你连讲完故事的牌都没有。
raise100.en: Raise his thickest board and, once called, you lack even the cards to finish the story.

objective.zh: 识别对手范围甜区并放手。
objective.en: Recognize his sweet-spot boards and let go.

history.zh: 翻前：CO 加注 2.5bb，你在 BTN 跟注，盲注弃牌。
history.en: Preflop: CO opens to 2.5bb, you call on the BTN, blinds fold.
Flop T♥7♣3♥: CO bets 3.3bb (50%).

explanation.zh: 两头顺 + 同花听 = 对他超对都接近五五开的怪兽听牌。加注的算术无可指摘：他弃掉是利润，他跟注你几乎不落后，他全下你也有价格。跟注隐蔽，但浪费了这手牌的统治力。
explanation.en: Open-ended plus a flush draw is a monster — near a coin flip even against his overpairs. The raise math is airtight: folds are profit, calls leave you barely behind, and even a shove gives you a price. Calling hides you, but wastes the hand's dominance.

fold.zh: 十五张改进牌面前点下弃牌，是把整套权益课白学了。
fold.en: Folding fifteen outs un-learns the entire equity curriculum in one click.

objective.zh: 怪兽听牌用加注最大化两条赢路。
objective.en: Monster draws raise — maximize both ways to win.

history.zh: 翻前：CO 加注 2.5bb，你在 BTN 跟注，盲注弃牌。
history.en: Preflop: CO opens to 2.5bb, you call on the BTN, blinds fold.
Flop J♥8♠4♦: CO checks.

explanation.zh: 顶对顶踢面对过牌不需要客气：J84 带连张尾巴，让他的 88–TT、后门与高牌为继续看牌付钱。50% 是这张面价值与保护的平衡点；小一号也成立，只是收得薄一点。
explanation.en: Top pair top kicker facing a check owes nobody politeness: J84 has connecting tails, so charge his 88–TT, backdoors and overcards for the next card. 50% balances value and protection here; a size down works, just thinner.

check.zh: 控池是给边缘牌的礼遇——TPTK 在这里是收租方，不是求稳方。
check.en: Pot control is courtesy for marginal hands — TPTK collects rent here, it does not hide.

objective.zh: 顶对顶踢抓住过牌窗口收价值。
objective.en: TPTK cashes the check window for value.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop 8♠8♦3♣: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 对子面 883 是范围注的天堂：BB 很难有 8x，而你的高牌账面领先他的大半范围。33%（甚至 25%）几乎零风险地收割弃牌；A 高此刻就是「价值掺诈唬」的两面牌。
explanation.en: Paired 883 is range-bet heaven: BB rarely holds an eight, and your high cards lead most of his range on paper. A 33% (even 25%) bet harvests folds at near-zero risk; ace-high plays both value and bluff at once.

check.zh: 纸面优势属于你，免费牌属于他——别把主动权捐出去。
check.en: The paper edge is yours; the free card is his. Do not donate the initiative.

bet100.zh: 没人有牌的面上砸大注，唯一被「保护」的是他的弃牌按钮。
bet100.en: Bombing a board nobody hit only protects his fold button.

objective.zh: 对子面执行高频小额范围注。
objective.en: Paired boards take the high-frequency small range bet.

history.en: Preflop: CO (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop 9♥8♥7♥: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 987 三红心是全游戏最危险的牌面之一，但你的 A♥ 改写剧本：坚果同花被你阻断，自己还握着随时升级的回路。33% 小注收薄价值兼控池——大注在这里属于已成同花的人。
explanation.en: 987 all hearts is one of the scariest boards in the game, yet your A♥ rewrites the script: the nut flush is blocked and you carry the upgrade path yourself. A 33% bet takes thin value with control — big bets here belong to made flushes.

bet100.zh: 两极面的超大注是同花的语言；说别人的方言会被听出口音。
bet100.en: Overbets on polar boards are flush language — speak it without one and the accent shows.

objective.zh: 用关键阻断牌敢于薄注危险面。
objective.en: Key blockers license thin bets on scary boards.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.
Flop K♠Q♥2♦: BB checks.

explanation.zh: KQ2 双高张同时砸中 BB 防守区的 KQ、QJ、KT，你的 76s 只有后门权益。这是 c-bet 频率该降下来的面：过牌保护你的过牌范围，小注作为混合的另一翼低频存在。
explanation.en: KQ2 hits the BB's KQ, QJ and KT defends as hard as it hits you, and 76s holds only backdoors. This is where c-bet frequency comes down: check to protect your checking range, with the small bet living on as the low-frequency wing.

bet75.zh: 在双方都命中的面上用大注空气开火，正面撞向他范围最硬的部分。
bet75.en: Barreling air big on a board both ranges hit charges straight into his strongest holdings.

objective.zh: 学会在「双方都命中」的面降频。
objective.en: Throttle frequency on boards both ranges smash.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.

history.zh: 翻牌 K♣9♦8♦：你过牌，BTN 下注 2.8bb（50%）。
history.en: Flop K♣9♦8♦: you check, BTN bets 2.8bb (50%).

explanation.zh: 底两对在 K98 双方块面上是「现在最强、未来最怕」的牌：顺子、同花、反超两对的牌都排着队。check-raise 让 Kx 与听牌立刻交钱，把命运从转牌手里抢回来。
explanation.en: Bottom two pair on K98 with two diamonds is strongest-now, scared-later: straights, flushes and counterfeits all queue up. The check-raise charges Kx and draws right now and wrestles fate back from the turn card.

fold.zh: 把两对弃给半池下注，没有任何版本的扑克教材会签字。
fold.en: No edition of any poker book signs off on folding two pair to half pot.

objective.zh: 脆弱强牌提速收价值。
objective.en: Fragile monsters speed up — raise for value now.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 K♣7♠2♦：BB 过牌，你下注 1.8bb（33%），BB 跟注。
history.en: Flop K♣7♠2♦: BB checks, you bet 1.8bb (33%), BB calls.
Turn A♥: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 这张 A 几乎专属你的范围，而你恰好真的拿着它——顶两对。换大尺寸 75%：BB 的 Kx 与口袋对在「你范围里全是 Ax」的故事压迫下进退两难，跟是付钱、弃也称你的意。
explanation.en: That ace belongs almost exclusively to your range — and you actually hold it, with top two. Shift up to 75%: BB's Kx and pocket pairs squirm under the 'my range is full of Ax' story, paying when they call and obliging when they fold.

check.zh: 范围最好的转牌过牌，等于把刚到手的叙事权原地退货。
check.en: Checking your range's best turn card refunds the narrative you just bought.

bet25.zh: 好牌好故事配迷你注，是用价值换客气。
bet25.en: A mini-bet with a great hand and a great story trades value for politeness.

objective.zh: 利好转牌提档加注尺寸。
objective.en: Size up on turns that crown your range.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 K♠8♥3♣：BB 过牌，你下注 1.8bb（33%），BB 跟注。
history.en: Flop K♠8♥3♣: BB checks, you bet 1.8bb (33%), BB calls.
Turn 6♥: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 6♥ 是 BB 跟注范围的牌：87、76、65 全部升级，红心听牌也加了一张。你的 AQ 没改善、没阻断、也没有第二轮故事——刹车。免费看河牌，A 或 Q 落下时再开口。
explanation.en: The 6♥ is BB's card: 87, 76 and 65 all level up and the heart draw gains a card. Your AQ improved nothing, blocks nothing and has no second act — brake. Take the free river and speak again if an ace or queen lands.

bet75.zh: 在帮了他的转牌上加倍开火，是替对手的范围抬轿。
bet75.en: Doubling the barrel on his turn card carries his range's sedan chair for him.

objective.zh: 坏转牌果断踩刹车。
objective.en: Bad turn cards get the brake, not the gas.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 Q♥8♣3♦：BB 过牌，你过牌。
history.en: Flop Q♥8♣3♦: BB checks, you check back.
Turn 4♠: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 翻牌过牌不是放弃，是埋伏。空白转牌后 BB 两次示弱：JJ 现在向 8x、口袋小对与放弃的高牌收两条街里的第一条，50% 还顺便保护你被 K、A 反超的脆弱领先。
explanation.en: The flop check was an ambush, not a surrender. After a blank turn and two shows of weakness, JJ starts collecting from 8x, small pairs and abandoned overcards — and the 50% size protects a lead that any king or ace could steal.

check.zh: 连让两条街，河牌你将拿着「中等强度+零信息」做最贵的决定。
check.en: Check twice more and the river hands you the priciest decision with medium strength and zero information.

objective.zh: 延迟 c-bet 在空白转牌收网。
objective.en: Spring the delayed c-bet on a blank turn.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.

history.zh: 翻牌 K♥8♠4♦：你过牌，BTN 下注 1.8bb（33%），你跟注。
history.en: Flop K♥8♠4♦: you check, BTN bets 1.8bb (33%), you call.
Turn 2♣: you check, BTN bets 6.8bb (75%).

explanation.zh: 2♣ 是张空白牌：他的诈唬没改善，你的顶对也没贬值。第二轮 75% 正是双重开火剧本里给 Kx 施压的标准桥段——此刻弃牌，他的剧本每一页都白拿利润。带着好踢脚跟住，河牌再审故事结尾。
explanation.en: The 2♣ is a blank: his bluffs gained nothing and your top pair lost nothing. The 75% second barrel is the standard double-barrel script for pressuring Kx — fold here and every page of his script prints. Call with the good kicker and audit the river ending.

fold.zh: 空白转牌上弃掉顶对，等于宣布「连开两枪我就走」——对手会记住的。
fold.en: Folding top pair on a blank turn announces that two bullets always work — opponents take notes.

raise100.zh: 加注把他的诈唬全吓走、价值全留下，还把河牌的选择权一并烧掉。
raise100.en: Raising folds his bluffs, keeps his value, and burns your river options as kindling.

objective.zh: 空白转牌的双重开火照单接收。
objective.en: Blank-turn barrels get called, not believed.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.

history.zh: 翻牌 6♥5♣2♦：你过牌，BTN 下注 2.8bb（50%），你跟注。
history.en: Flop 6♥5♣2♦: you check, BTN bets 2.8bb (50%), you call.

history.zh: 转牌 9♠：你过牌，BTN 下注 5.6bb（50%），轮到你。
history.en: Turn 9♠: you check, BTN bets 5.6bb (50%), action on you.

explanation.zh: 9♠ 把听牌兑现成坚果顺。他还在开火，正是收割窗口：加注向超对与两对收满，且河牌任何一张同花面或对子面都可能吓停行动。慢打到河牌是把已到账的钱重新押给方差。
explanation.en: The 9♠ cashes the draw into the nut straight. He is still firing — that is the harvest window: raise to charge overpairs and two pairs in full, before any river flush card or pair freezes the action. Slowplaying re-bets banked money on variance.

fold.zh: 拿着坚果点弃牌，唯一的解释是看错了自己的牌。
fold.en: Folding the nuts has exactly one explanation: misreading your own hand.

objective.zh: 听牌兑现当街提速收钱。
objective.en: The moment a draw cashes, raise and collect.

history.en: Preflop: CO (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 J♣8♠3♠：BB 过牌，你下注 1.8bb（33%），BB 跟注。
history.en: Flop J♣8♠3♠: BB checks, you bet 1.8bb (33%), BB calls.
Turn Q♦: BB checks.

explanation.zh: Q♦ 一张牌干了三件坏事：把你的顶对降成第二对、点亮 KT/T9 的顺子、还住进他防守范围的 QJ、Q9 里。AJ 此刻的工作是带着摊牌价值安全过河——过牌，让底池停在你的牌力刻度上。
explanation.en: One Q♦ does three bad things: demotes your top pair to second, lights up KT/T9 straights, and moves into his QJ/Q9 defends. AJ's job now is escorting showdown value safely to the river — check, and keep the pot on your hand's scale.

bet75.zh: 被反超后继续加码，是替新科顶对修建底池。
bet75.en: Piling on after being overtaken builds the pot for the new top pair.

bet33.zh: 连小注都问不出有用的答案——更差的牌不会跟，更好的牌不会走。
bet33.en: Even small gets no useful answer: worse folds, better stays.

objective.zh: 被反超转牌带摊牌价值控池。
objective.en: Overtaken turns escort showdown value, not bets.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 K♦8♣4♠：BB 过牌，你下注 1.8bb（33%），BB 跟注。
history.en: Flop K♦8♣4♠: BB checks, you bet 1.8bb (33%), BB calls.
Turn 2♥: checks through.
River 9♦: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 河牌问句只有一个：「更差的牌会跟吗？」会——KJ、KT、固执的 8x 和刚配对的 9x 都在他的过牌-跟注区。顶对好踢脚下 50% 收第二条街，这条街正是长期赢家与保本者的分水岭。
explanation.en: The river asks one question: do worse hands call? They do — KJ, KT, stubborn 8x and freshly paired 9x all live in his check-call zone. Top pair good kicker bets 50% for the second street, the exact street that separates winners from break-even players.

check.zh: 怕被加注而放掉薄价值，一年下来漏掉的正是你的利润率。
check.en: Skipping thin value for fear of a raise leaks exactly your yearly win rate.

bet100.zh: 全底池把 KJ、KT 全部吓进弃牌堆——筛掉的恰是付钱的人。
bet100.en: Pot-size scares KJ and KT into the muck — filtering out the very hands that pay.

objective.zh: 敢于下出薄价值的河牌注。
objective.en: Dare the thin value bet on the river.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.

history.zh: 翻牌 K♣6♠2♥：你过牌，BTN 下注 1.8bb（33%），你跟注。
history.en: Flop K♣6♠2♥: you check, BTN bets 1.8bb (33%), you call.

history.zh: 转牌 Q♦：你过牌，BTN 下注 4.6bb（50%），你跟注。
history.en: Turn Q♦: you check, BTN bets 4.6bb (50%), you call.

history.zh: 河牌 A♥：你过牌，BTN 下注 13.7bb（75%）。
history.en: River A♥: you check, BTN bets 13.7bb (75%).

explanation.zh: K、Q、A 三张高张逐街落下，每一张都加固他的故事而削弱你的：99 如今被三张牌压顶，而他三条街的尺寸阶梯（33→50→75）讲的是一个连贯的价值叙事。没有阻断、故事无漏洞——这是教科书式的弃牌。
explanation.en: King, queen, ace — every street stacked another brick on his story and pulled one from yours. Your nines now sit under three overcards, and his 33→50→75 sizing ladder tells one coherent value tale. No blockers, no cracks in the story — a textbook fold.

call.zh: 英雄跟注需要两样东西：他故事里的漏洞，和你手里的阻断。这里两手空空。
call.en: Hero calls need two things: a crack in his story and blockers in your hand. You hold neither.

raise100.zh: 用 99 把死局变成更大的死局——加注在这里没有任何受众。
raise100.en: Raising turns a lost pot into a bigger lost pot — there is no audience for it.

objective.zh: 故事连贯的三重开火面前认输。
objective.en: When the triple-barrel story holds, concede.

history.zh: 翻前：BTN 加注 2.5bb，你在 BB 跟注防守。
history.en: Preflop: BTN opens to 2.5bb, you defend the BB with a call.

history.zh: 翻牌 T♥7♣3♦：你过牌，BTN 过牌。
history.en: Flop T♥7♣3♦: you check, BTN checks back.
Turn 4♥: you bet 2.8bb (50%), BTN calls.
River 2♣: action is on you first.

explanation.zh: 他翻牌过牌回避，已把范围掐去最强一截；转牌又用跟注自首了「中等牌力」。空白河牌上你的顶对继续是老板：50% 向 7x、口袋对与不死心的 A 高收最后一笔。把收款单递过去，别替他过牌。
explanation.en: His flop check-back already amputated the top of his range, and the turn call confessed to medium strength. On a blank river your top pair is still the boss: bet 50% to collect the last installment from 7x, pocket pairs and stubborn ace-highs. Hand over the bill — do not check it for him.

check.zh: 把收款机交给一个已经认过怂的对手，他只会按「免费摊牌」。
check.en: Hand the register to a player who already confessed weakness and he will only press 'free showdown.'

objective.zh: 对过牌回避者主动追价值。
objective.en: Chase value into the check-back range.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 Q♠8♦3♣：BB 过牌，你下注 1.8bb（33%），BB 跟注。
history.en: Flop Q♠8♦3♣: BB checks, you bet 1.8bb (33%), BB calls.

history.zh: 转牌 7♥：BB 过牌，你下注 4.6bb（50%），BB 跟注。
history.en: Turn 7♥: BB checks, you bet 4.6bb (50%), BB calls.
River 2♠: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 跟了两街的范围里挤满 Qx：空白河牌上他没有理由突然消失。AA 的第三街要下出体重——75% 让顶对做一次完整的付费决定。客气的小注省下的不是风险，是你的利润。
explanation.en: A range that called twice is packed with Qx, and a blank river gives it no reason to vanish. Aces bet the third street at full weight — 75% makes top pair face one complete, expensive decision. A polite small bet saves no risk, only your profit.

check.zh: 三街价值牌在终点线前停步，前两街的铺垫全部作废。
check.en: Stopping a three-street value hand at the finish line voids the first two streets of setup.

bet25.zh: 迷你注向 Qx 收小费，而他本来准备好付正餐的钱。
bet25.en: A mini-bet tips Qx when it came prepared to pay for dinner.

objective.zh: 强价值河牌下出完整体重。
objective.en: Big value bets the river at full weight.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 J♣8♣4♦：BB 过牌，你下注 1.8bb（33%），BB 跟注。
history.en: Flop J♣8♣4♦: BB checks, you bet 1.8bb (33%), BB calls.
Turn 3♠: checks through.
River 2♥: BB checks.

explanation.zh: 诈唬是讲故事，而你的故事在转牌过牌时已经断更：突然在 2♥ 河牌重新开火，剧情里既没有 3 也没有 2 的伏笔。听完故事的对手只会用 8x 把你抓个正着。Q 高有时还能白捡摊牌——免费的别浪费。
explanation.en: A bluff is storytelling, and yours stopped publishing at the turn check: refiring on the 2♥ river has neither a three nor a deuce anywhere in your plot. An audience that heard the whole tale snaps you off with 8x. Queen-high even wins the odd free showdown — take it.

bet75.zh: 断更后的大结局没人买账——这注的唯一读者是他的跟注键。
bet75.en: Nobody buys a finale after the story went dark — this bet's only reader is his call button.

objective.zh: 讲不通的河牌诈唬主动放弃。
objective.en: Bluffs without a story stand down on the river.

history.en: Preflop: BTN (you) raises to 2.5bb, BB calls.

history.zh: 翻牌 8♦5♣2♠：BB 过牌，你下注 1.8bb（33%），BB 跟注。
history.en: Flop 8♦5♣2♠: BB checks, you bet 1.8bb (33%), BB calls.

history.zh: 转牌 9♥：BB 过牌，你下注 4.6bb（50%），BB 跟注。
history.en: Turn 9♥: BB checks, you bet 4.6bb (50%), BB calls.

history.zh: 河牌 T♥：BB 过牌，你下注 9.2bb（50%），BB 加注到 27.5bb。
history.en: River T♥: BB checks, you bet 9.2bb (50%), BB check-raises to 27.5bb.

explanation.zh: 8-5-2-9-T 的跑牌把 76、JT、T9、99 全部送进他的防守范围，而河牌的过牌-加注是扑克里最重价值的一条线。KK 在这里只是一个漂亮的诈唬捕手，可他的线路里几乎没有诈唬可捕。付学费的跟注偶尔存在——常规对手面前，弃牌就是答案。
explanation.en: The 8-5-2-9-T runout delivers 76, JT, T9 and 99 straight into his defending range, and the river check-raise is the most value-heavy line in poker. KK is a handsome bluff-catcher here, but his line carries almost no bluffs to catch. The tuition call exists at some frequency — versus standard opponents, folding is the answer.

raise150.zh: 对加注再加注需要坚果级牌力，KK 在连成一片的跑牌上离坚果隔着整条街区。
raise150.en: Re-raising a raise needs the nuts, and on this connected runout KK lives blocks away from them.

objective.zh: 尊重河牌过牌-加注的价值密度。
objective.en: Respect the value density of river check-raises.
